purpose: Catalog of the dashboard's 10 CSS files, the CSS custom-property design token system, status color palette (in_progress/completed/failed/blocked), and the four built-in themes (Original/Light/Ocean/Custom) plus the theme-switching mechanism via :root attribute.
gotchas: All colors must reference --color-* tokens; hardcoded hex values break theming
Custom theme persists to localStorage and overrides root tokens at runtime
Class names prefixed per domain (e.g. .git-manager-*) to avoid collision
patterns: CSS custom properties at :root drive entire palette
Theme switching via data-theme attribute on body
conventions: Files in src/ui/styles/ named after component or domain
